item.title: Kurt Sova: An Unsolved Case From The '80s
item.description: Seventeen year old Kurt Sova left home to attend a party in 1981 and never made it back. Days later, his body was discovered in a ravine not far from where he was last seen. Authorities ruled it an accident, but his family believes crucial details were ignored. With conflicting witness accounts, unexplained injuries, and lingering doubts, Kurt’s death remains one of Ohio’s most unsettling unsolved cases.

media:content.media:title: Kurt Sova: An Unsolved Case From The '80s
media:content.media:description: Seventeen year old Kurt Sova left home to attend a party in 1981 and never made it back. Days later, his body was discovered in a ravine not far from where he was last seen. Authorities ruled it an accident, but his family believes crucial details were ignored. With conflicting witness accounts, unexplained injuries, and lingering doubts, Kurt’s death remains one of Ohio’s most unsettling unsolved cases.

item.title: Fashion Empire Heir Gunned Down | The Real Murder Behind House of Gucci
item.description: Maurizio Gucci, heir to the iconic fashion dynasty, was shot and killed outside his Milan office in 1995 in a crime that stunned the luxury world. What first appeared to be a targeted attack soon unraveled into a scandal involving betrayal, jealousy, and a murder for hire plot that reached into his own inner circle. As investigators followed the money and uncovered secret relationships, the glamorous facade of the Gucci empire collapsed. This is the true story that inspired House of Gucci and the shocking conspiracy that brought down a dynasty.

media:content.media:title: Fashion Empire Heir Gunned Down | The Real Murder Behind House of Gucci
media:content.media:description: Maurizio Gucci, heir to the iconic fashion dynasty, was shot and killed outside his Milan office in 1995 in a crime that stunned the luxury world. What first appeared to be a targeted attack soon unraveled into a scandal involving betrayal, jealousy, and a murder for hire plot that reached into his own inner circle. As investigators followed the money and uncovered secret relationships, the glamorous facade of the Gucci empire collapsed. This is the true story that inspired House of Gucci and the shocking conspiracy that brought down a dynasty.

item.title: Was She Pushed Off a Cliff? The Suspicious Death of Rhonda Casto
item.description: Rhonda Casto traveled to West Virginia for what was supposed to be a romantic trip with her boyfriend. Hours later, she was dead at the bottom of a cliff. He claimed she slipped. Investigators believed something far more sinister happened. As evidence mounted and the case went to trial, the question became unavoidable: was this a tragic fall, or a calculated push?

media:content.media:title: Was She Pushed Off a Cliff? The Suspicious Death of Rhonda Casto
media:content.media:description: Rhonda Casto traveled to West Virginia for what was supposed to be a romantic trip with her boyfriend. Hours later, she was dead at the bottom of a cliff. He claimed she slipped. Investigators believed something far more sinister happened. As evidence mounted and the case went to trial, the question became unavoidable: was this a tragic fall, or a calculated push?
